positive: A whimsical, stylized forest creature silhouette, resembling a mix of fox and celestial moth, perched on an ornate crescent moon. The creature has intricate, glowing wing details and soft, flowing tail accents. The style should be highly detailed vector illustration, neo-tribal, and psychedelic, with strong linear elements and high contrast. Use a limited color palette of deep sapphire blue, iridescent gold, and glowing emerald green against a pure black background. The composition must be perfectly centered, optimized for seamless textile repeating patterns, featuring sharp edges and clean lines. Cosmic dust particles emanate gently from the creature's wings. Trending on ArtStation, hyper-detailed, high contrast, minimal background noise.
negative: ugly, amateur, blurry, distorted, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low quality, noisy, jpeg artifacts, poor anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, graffiti
